title: Non-Resident Tax Calculator - Canada.ca
content:
## Non-Resident Tax Calculator
The non-resident tax calculator is for your convenience.
By using this calculator, you accept all risks linked to its use and to the use of your computer.

## Privacy and your information
The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA):
- Does not collect nor store the information you enter
- Does not receive the results of your calculations
All information stays on your computer.
After you use the calculator, some information may remain in your browser cache. To help protect your privacy, you should clear your browser cache after you finish.

## When the calculator applies
The calculator rates apply only if:
- you are a non-resident of Canada, and
- You are entitled to treaty benefits
To determine if a tax treaty applies to you, see Status of Tax Treaty Negotiations .

## Limits of the calculator
- Uses only the information you provide
- Gives results based on that information
The CRA is not responsible for errors if the information you enter is incomplete or incorrect. The calculator does not replace the law or official CRA guidance.
To continue, select "I accept" at the bottom of the page.
If you do not agree with these terms, select “I do not accept.”
I accept I do not accept

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
